notes.introduction: An exposition of Psalm 119:33, 44, and 112 on the theme of perseverance in obedience to God's Word until the end of life, set alongside Acts 20:24, 2 Timothy 4:6-7, and 1 Corinthians 15:51-58. The unknown timing of death and Christ's return frames the psalmist's repeated resolve to keep God's statutes continually and unto the end.
